title: Qwik
excerpt: description: Deploy a Qwik City application to Cloudflare Pages. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. [Qwik ↗](https://github.com/builderio/qwik) is an open-source, DOM-centric, resumable web application framework designed for best possible time to interactive by focusing on [resumability ↗](https://qwik.builder.io/docs/concepts/resumable/), server-side rendering of HTML and [fine-grained lazy-loading ↗](https://qwik.builder.io/docs/concepts/progressive/#lazy-loading) of code.…
